# bangladesh-geojson

> Free, open-source geographic data for Bangladesh — divisions, districts, upazilas, postcodes, and boundary GeoJSON. Bilingual (English + Bangla). Distributed as an npm package. MIT licensed.

bangladesh-geojson is a static data package for Bangladesh administrative geography, intended for use in JavaScript and TypeScript applications. It contains all 8 divisions, 64 districts, 494 upazilas, and 1,349 postcodes. Each record carries both an English name and a Bangla (`bn_name`) name. Boundary polygons are included as GeoJSON, joined to the same IDs.

The author is Fahim Reza (@ifahimreza on X / GitHub). The project is maintained as a public good — no paywall, no API server, no rate limits.

## Install

```
npm install bangladesh-geojson
```

## Quick reference

```ts
import bd from 'bangladesh-geojson';

bd.getDivisions();              // all 8 divisions
bd.getDistricts();              // all 64 districts
bd.getDistrictsByDivision(id);  // districts in a division
bd.getUpazilas();               // all 494 upazilas
bd.getUpazilasByDistrict(id);   // upazilas in a district
bd.getPostcodes();              // all 1,349 postcodes
bd.getPostcodesByDistrict(id);  // postcodes in a district
bd.search(query);               // English + Bangla name search
bd.getFullHierarchy();          // nested division → district → upazila tree
```

## Subpath imports

Each dataset has its own subpath so bundlers tree-shake unused layers:

- `bangladesh-geojson/divisions`
- `bangladesh-geojson/districts`
- `bangladesh-geojson/upazilas`
- `bangladesh-geojson/postcodes`
- `bangladesh-geojson/dhaka-city`
- `bangladesh-geojson/boundary` — upazila polygons (~3.5 MB GeoJSON)
- `bangladesh-geojson/bazars` — ~3,500 OpenStreetMap marketplaces
- `bangladesh-geojson/routes` — motorway / trunk / primary highways

## Data shape

Division: `{ id, name, bn_name, lat, long }`
District: `{ id, division_id, name, bn_name, lat, long }`
Upazila: `{ id, district_id, name, bn_name }`
Postcode: `{ division_id, district_id, upazila, postOffice, postCode }`

## Documentation

- Demo (interactive map + search): https://geojson.bd/demo/
- Usage docs: https://geojson.bd/docs/
- Source: https://github.com/ifahimreza/bangladesh-geojson
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/bangladesh-geojson

## Licenses

- Code: MIT
- Reference data (divisions, districts, upazilas, postcodes): MIT
- Boundary GeoJSON: CC BY 4.0 (sourced from geoBoundaries / BBS / OCHA)
- Bazars and routes: ODbL 1.0 (sourced from OpenStreetMap; attribution required: "© OpenStreetMap contributors")

## Common use cases

- Address dropdowns (Division → District → Upazila cascade) in e-commerce checkout
- Postcode validation and lookup
- KYC / fintech address verification
- Coverage maps for delivery, NGO programs, election visualizations
- Bilingual search for any Bangladesh app
